reasoning_content:
Looking at the scores, I can see that most test cases have very high scores (98-99%), but none have perfect 100%. The total is 98.75/100.00, which is already excellent. The minor deductions are likely due to small issues with StartOfLine/LeadingSpace detection or other minor formatting differences.

Let me check one of the test cases that doesn't have a perfect score to see what the issue is.
